source.reference: Vanilla Arma 3 config values. 5.8x42mm DBP87 68gr FMJ for Type 95/CAR-95. G7 BC ~0.170 estimated (comparable to 5.56mm SS109, slightly lower due to smaller caliber).
source.methodology: BC values estimated from similar known projectiles using form factor approximations or Litz estimation methods. Not directly measured or published.
